mnemonics.title: GREEN IT Goals
mnemonics.content: GREEN IT: G-R-E-E-N (Green computing reduces energy and novel IT)

mnemonics.title: 3Rs of Sustainability
mnemonics.content: 3Rs: R-R-R (Reduce waste, Reuse resources, Recycle materials)

mnemonics.title: PUE Formula
mnemonics.content: PUE: Power Used Effectively = Total Facility ÷ IT Equipment (TEAM UP: Total Energy = All Making Useful Power)

mnemonics.title: Energy Saving Techniques
mnemonics.content: SAVE IT: Sleep mode, Auto-power off, Virtualization, Efficient hardware, Idle timeout, Thin clients, Intelligent cooling

acronyms.usage: Measures data center energy efficiency, lower is better (ideal = 1.0)
Power management technique adjusting CPU speed based on workload
Centralized desktop hosting for energy-efficient client computing
Standard for power management in computers
Backup power system ensuring continuous operation

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a pie chart: IT Equipment Energy is the inner circle (useful work), Total Facility Energy includes outer ring (cooling, lighting). Smaller outer ring = better PUE.
Think of one physical server as a apartment building with many individual apartments (VMs), each serving different tenants (applications).
Energy flows like a waterfall: Utility power → UPS → PDU → Server → (Heat rises) ← Cooling system. The wider the waterfall, the more energy lost.
Thin client = thin/light (small brain), relies on server (big brain). Desktop = has its own big brain (processor), uses more energy.

analogies.analogy: Like a multiplex cinema showing multiple movies on one screen setup, multiple virtual screens run on one physical server.
PUE is like fuel efficiency in a car: lower PUE = more miles per gallon (more computing per unit of energy).
Like a public utility - just like electricity, you use what you need and pay for what you use without maintaining power plants.
Thin client is like a television remote - lightweight display device that sends commands to a main controller (the TV/server).
Green IT is like making your home energy efficient - insulation, LED lights, smart thermostat - same comfort, less energy.
